objective: connect the minimum builder layer and minimum reviewer layer into a single docs-only operational flow before implementation
confirmed_facts: spec builder minimum templates are already defined
spec reviewer minimum templates are already defined
the missing piece was the operational connection between builder output and reviewer input
interpretation: a connected flow reduces repeated human judgement during spec preparation
human approval should remain the final gate after reviewer pass or reject
runtime integration should remain deferred until the manual flow is stable
risks: the builder and reviewer flow is still manual and depends on disciplined usage
real projects may expose additional rejection categories not yet represented
the pass format may need to expand once multi-session generation is attempted
open_issues: the builder and reviewer flow is not yet integrated into run_session
real project trial is still required to validate practical usability
next_actions: run one real project through the builder to reviewer flow in session-40
collect rejection patterns and refine reviewer categories
evaluate whether runtime integration is justified after manual validation

final_judgement.reason: the minimum builder and reviewer components are now connected by a canonical docs-only flow with structured pass and reject paths
